subject: {player} praised by media for recent form
body:
{player} has received special praise from the media for their outstanding recent performances with {team}.

The coverage mentions that your coaching has been instrumental in unlocking {player}'s potential.

Player development is one of the key measures of a successful coach.

es.subject: La prensa elogia a {player} por su forma reciente
es.body:
{player} ha recibido elogios especiales de la prensa por sus destacadas actuaciones recientes con {team}.

La cobertura menciona que su entrenamiento ha sido fundamental para desbloquear el potencial de {player}.

El desarrollo de jugadores es una de las medidas clave de un entrenador exitoso.
